title: PlatformException catch comment misleads future readers about Android failures
description: background_service.dart comments 'Background service is optional — silently ignore platform errors.' This makes Android-native failures (SecurityException from missing permission, IllegalStateException from API restrictions) indistinguishable from expected non-Android no-ops. A contributor won't know that PlatformException on Android means silent background-kill exposure. What would make it clear: split the catch into MissingPluginException (no-op comment) and PlatformException (log warning with message on debug builds, or at minimum document the Android consequence).
